executives.name: Hamid Moghadam
executives.background: Co-founder of Prologis and has served as CEO since 1997. He was previously Chairman and CEO of AMB Property Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Co-Founder, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer

executives.background: President of Prologis since January 2023. Previously served as Global Head of Capital Deployment.

executives.background: Chief Financial Officer since April 2022. Previously served as Treasurer and Head of Corporate Capital Markets.

executives.name: Edward Nekritz
executives.background: Chief Legal Officer and General Counsel since 1995. Oversees legal, risk management, and ESG.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Legal Officer, General Counsel and Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Hamid Moghadam
